<!-- 🇨🇳 中文 | 🇬🇧 English -->

## 📝 概述 / Summary

## 🧪 测试 / Tests

- [ ] `pytest`

## ✅ 检查清单 / Checklist

- [ ] 我为行为变更更新了测试 / I updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] 我更新了文档或示例 / I updated documentation or examples when needed.
- [ ] 我为面向用户的变更更新了 `CHANGELOG.md` / I updated `CHANGELOG.md` for public-facing changes.
- [ ] 我没有提交 API Key、`.env`、生成缓存或临时克隆仓库 / I did not commit API keys, `.env`, generated caches, or temporary cloned repositories.
- [ ] CLI 参数、环境变量和输出文件名保持兼容，或已记录破坏性变更 / CLI arguments, environment variables, and output filenames remain compatible or the breaking change is documented.
